allow: Bash(python -c "import sys, json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(''''Answer preview:'''', d[''''answer''''][:500]\)")

Bash(python -c "import sys, json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); sources = set\(s[''''source''''] for s in d[''''sources'''']\); print\(f''''Sources: {len\(sources\)} documents''''\); print\(''''Last 200 chars:'''', d[''''answer''''][-200:]\)")
